chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D- 01 of 2025 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.39/2025 2.For hearing of main case. 22.01.2025 Mr.Ali Almani, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, Advocate for Respondent (Tax Department) Learned counsel for the petitioner states that representations are pending before Director General of Customs Valuation as available from page 43 to page 85, and the same have not been decided by the Department despite repeated requests and reminders. He further states that the petitioner would be satisfied if directions would be given to the Department to decide the representations expeditiously within 15 days vide speaking order after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned counsel for the Department expresses no cavil to the aforesaid and states that it would be just and proper to disposed of this petition as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
